                          THUMB

                          AREA ||i.validate_bin_nvic||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  validate_bin_nvic PROC
;;;30     
;;;31     __weak uint8_t validate_bin_nvic(const uint8_t *buf)
000000  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;32     {
;;;33         // test for known required NVIC entries
;;;34         //  00 is stack pointer (RAM address)
;;;35         //  04 is Reset vector  (FLASH address)
;;;36         //  08 NMI_Handler      (FLASH address)
;;;37         //  12 HardFault_Handler(FLASH address)
;;;38         uint32_t i = 4, nvic_val = 0;
;;;39         uint8_t index = 0, in_range = 0;
000002  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
;;;40         // test the initial SP value
;;;41         memcpy(&nvic_val, buf + 0, sizeof(nvic_val));
000004  7803              LDRB     r3,[r0,#0]
000006  4611              MOV      r1,r2
000008  4319              ORRS     r1,r1,r3
00000a  7843              LDRB     r3,[r0,#1]
00000c  25ff              MOVS     r5,#0xff
00000e  022d              LSLS     r5,r5,#8
000010  021b              LSLS     r3,r3,#8
000012  43a9              BICS     r1,r1,r5
000014  402b              ANDS     r3,r3,r5
000016  4319              ORRS     r1,r1,r3
000018  7883              LDRB     r3,[r0,#2]
00001a  022d              LSLS     r5,r5,#8
00001c  041b              LSLS     r3,r3,#16
00001e  43a9              BICS     r1,r1,r5
000020  402b              ANDS     r3,r3,r5
000022  4319              ORRS     r1,r1,r3
000024  78c3              LDRB     r3,[r0,#3]
000026  2404              MOVS     r4,#4                 ;38
000028  061b              LSLS     r3,r3,#24
00002a  4319              ORRS     r1,r1,r3
;;;42     
;;;43         if (0 == test_range(nvic_val, target_device.ram_start, target_device.ram_end)) {
00002c  4b2c              LDR      r3,|L1.224|
00002e  4616              MOV      r6,r2                 ;39
000030  691d              LDR      r5,[r3,#0x10]  ; target_device
000032  695b              LDR      r3,[r3,#0x14]  ; target_device
000034  42a9              CMP      r1,r5
000036  d309              BCC      |L1.76|
000038  4299              CMP      r1,r3                 ;32
00003a  d914              BLS      |L1.102|
00003c  e006              B        |L1.76|
                  |L1.62|
;;;44             while (!(target_device.extra_ram[index].start == 0 && target_device.extra_ram[index].end == 0)) { //try additional reqions if present
;;;45                 if (1 == test_range(nvic_val, target_device.extra_ram[index].start, target_device.extra_ram[index].end)) {
00003e  6cdb              LDR      r3,[r3,#0x4c]
000040  42a9              CMP      r1,r5
000042  d301              BCC      |L1.72|
000044  4299              CMP      r1,r3
000046  d90c              BLS      |L1.98|
                  |L1.72|
000048  1c52              ADDS     r2,r2,#1
;;;46                     in_range = 1;
;;;47                     break;
;;;48                 }
;;;49                 index++;
00004a  b2d2              UXTB     r2,r2
                  |L1.76|
00004c  4b24              LDR      r3,|L1.224|
00004e  00d5              LSLS     r5,r2,#3              ;44
000050  18eb              ADDS     r3,r5,r3              ;44
000052  6c9d              LDR      r5,[r3,#0x48]         ;44
000054  2d00              CMP      r5,#0                 ;44
000056  d1f2              BNE      |L1.62|
000058  6cdf              LDR      r7,[r3,#0x4c]         ;44
00005a  2f00              CMP      r7,#0                 ;44
00005c  d1ef              BNE      |L1.62|
;;;50             }
;;;51             if (in_range == 0) {
00005e  2e00              CMP      r6,#0
000060  d03c              BEQ      |L1.220|
                  |L1.98|
;;;52                 return 0;
;;;53             }
;;;54         }
;;;55         
;;;56         
;;;57     
;;;58         // Reset_Handler
;;;59         // NMI_Handler
;;;60         // HardFault_Handler
;;;61         for (; i <= 12; i += 4) {
000062  2c0c              CMP      r4,#0xc
000064  d838              BHI      |L1.216|
                  |L1.102|
000066  4a1e              LDR      r2,|L1.224|
;;;62             memcpy(&nvic_val, buf + i, sizeof(nvic_val));
;;;63             if (0 == test_range(nvic_val, target_device.flash_start, target_device.flash_end)) {
000068  6892              LDR      r2,[r2,#8]
00006a  4694              MOV      r12,r2
00006c  4a1c              LDR      r2,|L1.224|
00006e  68d2              LDR      r2,[r2,#0xc]
000070  4696              MOV      lr,r2
                  |L1.114|
000072  1902              ADDS     r2,r0,r4              ;62
000074  7813              LDRB     r3,[r2,#0]            ;62
000076  0a09              LSRS     r1,r1,#8              ;62
000078  0209              LSLS     r1,r1,#8              ;62
00007a  4319              ORRS     r1,r1,r3              ;62
00007c  7853              LDRB     r3,[r2,#1]            ;62
00007e  25ff              MOVS     r5,#0xff              ;62
000080  022d              LSLS     r5,r5,#8              ;62
000082  021b              LSLS     r3,r3,#8              ;62
000084  43a9              BICS     r1,r1,r5              ;62
000086  402b              ANDS     r3,r3,r5              ;62
000088  4319              ORRS     r1,r1,r3              ;62
00008a  7893              LDRB     r3,[r2,#2]            ;62
00008c  022d              LSLS     r5,r5,#8              ;62
00008e  041b              LSLS     r3,r3,#16             ;62
000090  43a9              BICS     r1,r1,r5              ;62
000092  402b              ANDS     r3,r3,r5              ;62
000094  4319              ORRS     r1,r1,r3              ;62
000096  78d2              LDRB     r2,[r2,#3]            ;62
000098  0209              LSLS     r1,r1,#8              ;62
00009a  0a09              LSRS     r1,r1,#8              ;62
00009c  0612              LSLS     r2,r2,#24             ;62
00009e  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2              ;62
0000a0  4561              CMP      r1,r12                ;62
0000a2  d301              BCC      |L1.168|
0000a4  4571              CMP      r1,lr                 ;62
0000a6  d914              BLS      |L1.210|
                  |L1.168|
;;;64                 index = 0, in_range = 0;
0000a8  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
0000aa  4616              MOV      r6,r2
;;;65                 while (!(target_device.extra_flash[index].start == 0 && target_device.extra_flash[index].end == 0)) { //try additional reqions if present
0000ac  e006              B        |L1.188|
                  |L1.174|
;;;66                     if (1 == test_range(nvic_val, target_device.extra_flash[index].start, target_device.extra_flash[index].end)) {
0000ae  6adb              LDR      r3,[r3,#0x2c]
0000b0  42a9              CMP      r1,r5
0000b2  d301              BCC      |L1.184|
0000b4  4299              CMP      r1,r3
0000b6  d90c              BLS      |L1.210|
                  |L1.184|
0000b8  1c52              ADDS     r2,r2,#1
;;;67                         in_range = 1;
;;;68                         break;
;;;69                     }
;;;70                     index++;
0000ba  b2d2              UXTB     r2,r2
                  |L1.188|
0000bc  4b08              LDR      r3,|L1.224|
0000be  00d5              LSLS     r5,r2,#3              ;65
0000c0  18eb              ADDS     r3,r5,r3              ;65
0000c2  6a9d              LDR      r5,[r3,#0x28]         ;65
0000c4  2d00              CMP      r5,#0                 ;65
0000c6  d1f2              BNE      |L1.174|
0000c8  6adf              LDR      r7,[r3,#0x2c]         ;65
0000ca  2f00              CMP      r7,#0                 ;65
0000cc  d1ef              BNE      |L1.174|
;;;71                 }
;;;72                 if (in_range == 0) {
0000ce  2e00              CMP      r6,#0
0000d0  d004              BEQ      |L1.220|
                  |L1.210|
0000d2  1d24              ADDS     r4,r4,#4
0000d4  2c0c              CMP      r4,#0xc               ;61
0000d6  d9cc              BLS      |L1.114|
                  |L1.216|
;;;73                     return 0;
;;;74                 }
;;;75             }
;;;76         }
;;;77     
;;;78         return 1;
0000d8  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;79     }
0000da  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
                  |L1.220|
0000dc  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;73
0000de  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;80     
                          ENDP

                  |L1.224|
                          DCD      target_device

                          AREA ||i.validate_hexfile||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  validate_hexfile PROC
;;;80     
;;;81     __weak uint8_t validate_hexfile(const uint8_t *buf)
000000  7801              LDRB     r1,[r0,#0]
;;;82     {
;;;83         // look here for known hex records
;;;84         // add hex identifier b[0] == ':' && b[8] == {'0', '2', '3', '4', '5'}
;;;85         return ((buf[0] == ':') && ((buf[8] == '0') || (buf[8] == '2') || (buf[8] == '3') || (buf[8] == '4') || (buf[8] == '5'))) ? 1 : 0;
000002  293a              CMP      r1,#0x3a
000004  d10a              BNE      |L2.28|
000006  7a00              LDRB     r0,[r0,#8]
000008  2830              CMP      r0,#0x30
00000a  d009              BEQ      |L2.32|
00000c  2832              CMP      r0,#0x32
00000e  d007              BEQ      |L2.32|
000010  2833              CMP      r0,#0x33
000012  d005              BEQ      |L2.32|
000014  2834              CMP      r0,#0x34
000016  d003              BEQ      |L2.32|
000018  2835              CMP      r0,#0x35
00001a  d001              BEQ      |L2.32|
                  |L2.28|
00001c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;86     }
00001e  4770              BX       lr
                  |L2.32|
000020  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;85
000022  4770              BX       lr
                          ENDP
